mechanics.excerpt: Deprivation most often makes itself felt as mere inconvenience t0 daily routine Or shortage of luxury items_ Most of the other Inner Sphere worlds_ as well as the most advanced Periphery worlds, more clearly understand the cariousness of the Inner Sphere'= technology: On such worlds, everyday circumstances make people more aware of the frailty of technology: Businessmen may converse via cell phone on their way t0 work but they get there riding norse Or donkey: The latest luxury hovercratt may be parked next to vehicle fueled by methane collected from its owner's farm.
